data.name: Dash_DemoBanner
data.value: Demo mode — sample data, sync off. Data stays on this device.

data.name: Dash_Empty
data.value: No helpers yet. Tap + to add your first helper.

data.name: Help_Advance_Examples
data.value: • "Gave Raju an advance of 200" • "200 rupees udhaar to Geeta"

data.name: Help_Attendance_Examples
data.value: • "Geeta was absent today" / "Geeta didn't come" / "Geeta chutti" • "Geeta came" / "Geeta is present" / "Geeta aayi" • "Half day for Geeta" / "Geeta half-day" / "Geeta aadha din"

data.name: Help_Attendance_Title
data.value: Attendance (opens that helper's Calendar to show the result)

data.name: Help_Calendar_Body
data.value: Tap a day to cycle Present → Absent → Half-Day. For per-unit helpers (e.g. a milkman), tap a day to enter the units delivered instead. Shows the month's summary and running payable.

data.name: Help_Delivery_Examples
data.value: • "Raju delivered 1.5 litres" • "1.5 liters milk from Raju"

data.name: Help_Delivery_Title
data.value: Delivery — per-unit helpers, e.g. milkman (also opens the Calendar)

data.name: Help_EditDelete_Body
data.value: Tap the pencil icon on a helper's card on Home to edit their details, or delete them, from the same form.

data.name: Help_Home_Body
data.value: See every helper, today's attendance status, and the total payable for the month. Tap the mic to log attendance, deliveries, or ledger entries by voice.

data.name: Help_Ledger_Body
data.value: Log advances, bonuses, and deductions against a helper's wage, and see the running total for the month.

data.name: Help_Reports_Body
data.value: Generate a PDF report for a single helper or the whole household.

data.name: Help_Settle_Body
data.value: Review the wage breakdown (gross wage − unpaid absences − advances) and pay via UPI or log a cash payment.

data.name: Help_Tip
data.value: Tip: attendance and delivery commands take you straight to the helper's Calendar so you can see the logged day. Advance, deduction, bonus, and payment commands stay on Home and update the totals there.

data.name: Help_VoiceIntro
data.value: Tap the mic button on Home and say any of these. Say the helper's name clearly — if you only have one helper, you can leave the name out. Works fully offline, in English or romanized Hindi.

data.name: HelperForm_DeleteConfirm
data.value: Remove this helper and their records from the app?

data.name: Ledger_DeleteConfirm
data.value: Delete this entry? This can't be undone.

data.name: Ledger_Empty
data.value: No entries this month. Tap + to log an advance.

data.name: Legal_PrivacyBody
data.value:
Effective Date: 14 July 2026
PakkaHisaab ("the App") is developed and operated by Amit Kumar Agrawal ("we", "us", "our"). This Privacy Policy explains how we handle information when you use the App.
1. Information We Collect - Household helper details you enter: name, category, WhatsApp number, and UPI ID. - Attendance, wage, advance, and settlement records you create for your helpers. - Basic device and usage diagnostics (crash logs, app performance) via Microsoft App Center, used only to fix bugs and improve stability. - Voice audio captured only when you tap the microphone button, processed on-device to log an attendance/ledger entry, and not stored or transmitted after processing.
2. How We Use Information Data you enter is used solely to run the App's core features - tracking attendance, computing wages, and recording payments for the helpers you manage. In Demo mode, all data stays on your device and nothing is synced.
3. Data Storage and Sharing Your data is stored locally on your device (SQLite). If you sign in with an account (non-Demo mode), your data syncs to our servers solely so you can access it across your own devices. We do not sell your data or share it with third parties for advertising. Payments are initiated through your own installed UPI apps (Google Pay, PhonePe, Paytm, etc.) - the App never processes or stores your bank credentials.
4. Data Retention and Deletion You can delete any helper's record at any time from within the App. You can permanently delete your account and all associated data from Settings > Delete My Account & Data.
5. Security We take reasonable technical measures to protect your data, including local storage and secure transmission (HTTPS) for synced accounts.
6. Children's Privacy The App is not directed at children and is not intended for use by anyone under 18.
7. Changes to This Policy We may update this policy from time to time. Continued use of the App after changes means you accept the updated policy.
8. Contact Us For any privacy questions or requests, contact Amit Kumar Agrawal at amit.agrawal.hyd@outlook.com.

data.name: Legal_TermsBody
data.value:
Effective Date: 14 July 2026
These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your use of PakkaHisaab (the "App"), developed and operated by Amit Kumar Agrawal ("we", "us", "our"). By using the App, you agree to these Terms.
1. Use of the App PakkaHisaab helps you track attendance, wages, advances, and payments for household helpers (such as house help, milkmen, drivers, etc.) that you manage. You are responsible for the accuracy of the data you enter.
2. Your Account You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials and for all activity under your account. Demo mode does not require an account and keeps all data on your device only.
3. Payments The App does not process payments itself. "Pay via UPI" hands off to UPI apps already installed on your device; any payment made is between you and your chosen payment provider and the recipient. We are not responsible for failed, delayed, or disputed transactions.
4. Acceptable Use You agree not to use the App for any unlawful purpose or in a way that could harm, disable, or impair the App or interfere with any other party's use of it.
5. No Warranty The App is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind, express or implied. We do not guarantee the App will be error-free, uninterrupted, or fit for a particular purpose.
6. Limitation of Liability To the maximum extent permitted by law, Amit Kumar Agrawal shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the App, including any loss of data or financial loss arising from payments made using third-party UPI apps.
7. Termination You may stop using the App and delete your account at any time via Settings > Delete My Account & Data. We may suspend or terminate access for misuse of the App.
8. Governing Law These Terms are governed by the laws of India, without regard to conflict-of-law principles.
9. Changes to These Terms We may update these Terms from time to time. Continued use of the App after changes means you accept the updated Terms.
10. Contact Us For any questions about these Terms, contact Amit Kumar Agrawal at amit.agrawal.hyd@outlook.com.

data.name: Login_DemoHint
data.value: Instant, offline, no sign-up. Explore with sample data for Geeta (house help) and Raju (milkman).

data.name: Login_EmailInUse
data.value: An account with this email already exists. Try signing in instead.

data.name: Login_Failed
data.value: Sign-in failed. Check your details and connection.

data.name: Login_InvalidEmail
data.value: Please enter a valid email address

data.name: Login_InvalidInput
data.value: Please check your details and try again.

data.name: Login_PasswordTooShort
data.value: Password must be at least 8 characters

data.name: Login_ToggleMode
data.value: New here? Create an account · Have one? Sign in

data.name: Notify_AttendanceBody
data.value: Mark today's attendance for {0}. Default: Present.

data.name: Notify_SalaryBody
data.value: Salary for {0} is pending. Tap to settle.

data.name: Onboard_Slide1_Body
data.value: Tap a date to mark Present, Absent or Half-Day. Milk and deliveries too — everything lands in one clean khata.

data.name: Onboard_Slide2_Body
data.value: A daily 5 PM reminder asks about today's attendance. Mark 'Absent' right from the notification — no need to open the app.

data.name: Onboard_Slide3_Body
data.value: Wage minus absences minus advances — computed for you. Pay with any UPI app or log cash, and share PDF reports on WhatsApp.

data.name: Report_GenerationFailed
data.value: Couldn't generate the report. Please try again.

data.name: Reports_HouseholdDescription
data.value: Master summary across all your helpers

data.name: Reports_LedgerDescription
data.value: Daily attendance & money trail for one helper

data.name: Security_RootedMessage
data.value: This device appears rooted/jailbroken. Your financial data may be less secure here. We recommend using PakkaHisaab on a standard device.

data.name: Settings_DeleteDemoNote
data.value: Demo data is wiped from this device.

data.name: Settings_DeleteFailed
data.value: Could not delete the account. Check your password and connection.

data.name: Settings_DeleteWarning
data.value: This permanently erases your account and every helper, attendance and payment record — on this device and our servers. This cannot be undone.

data.name: Settle_ConfirmBody
data.value: Did you complete the payment of ₹ {1:N0} to {0}?

data.name: Settle_NoUpiApp
data.value: No UPI app found on this device

data.name: Settle_NoUpiIdHint
data.value: Add a UPI ID to this helper to enable one-tap UPI payment.

data.name: Voice_NotUnderstood
data.value: Sorry, I didn't catch that. Try: 'Gave Geeta 500 advance'.

data.name: Voice_PermissionDenied
data.value: Microphone permission is needed for voice commands. Enable it in Settings.

data.name: Voice_NoSpeech
data.value: Didn't hear anything. Try again and speak right after tapping the mic.

data.name: Voice_HelperNotRecognized
data.value: Couldn't match that to a helper. Try including their name, e.g. 'Gave Geeta 500 advance'.

data.name: Voice_Error
data.value: Something went wrong with voice input. Please try again.
